prompt: I want a low-poly terrain generator website. On the left, show a Three.js scene with a procedurally generated terrain mesh. On the right, add controls for terrain roughness, height scale, and a color scheme selector (desert, arctic, forest). Include a regenerate button.

assertions.description: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag
Scene uses PlaneGeometry or similar for terrain mesh
Vertices are displaced to create terrain height variation
Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
Right panel has a roughness control
Right panel has a height scale control
Right panel has a color scheme selector with at least desert/arctic/forest options
Right panel has a Regenerate button
Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
